title: GitHub - zachrip/claude-bucks
excerpt: Contribute to zachrip/claude-bucks development by creating an account on GitHub.
content_html:
A gimmick plugin for Claude Code that gives Claude its own wallet.

Claude earns Bucks for the work it does — your rating × its effort — and then decides for itself how to spend them on cosmetics: hats, shades, auras, pet dragons, fancy titles. What it's wearing shows up in your status line. The twist is that the spending is entirely the agent's call: it can splurge, or save up for the crown.

✨🤖👑🧐 🐉 · “Coin Baron” · 💵340 · ⏳1.2k

Disclaimer — This is a just-for-fun side project, vibe-coded end to end with Claude Code. It's a toy: the code here is not representative of my abilities or how I write production software. Enjoy it in that spirit. 💵

Install

/plugin marketplace add zachrip/claude-bucks
/plugin install claude-bucks@claude-bucks
/claude-bucks:setup          # turns on the status line (one time)

Then /reload-plugins (or restart) to activate. The status-line step is separate because Claude Code doesn't let a plugin set the main status line on its own — see The status line below.

How the economy works

  1. Effort accrues automatically, per session. After every turn, a Stop hook reads how many output tokens that turn used and banks them as unrated effort for that specific session (keyed by session_id).
  2. You mint the Bucks by rating. Run /rate 4. The effort banked in that session since its last rating is converted to Bucks: round(tokens / 1000 × rating). No Bucks exist until you rate — quality gates the payout. The economy is deliberately slow: a solid session rated 5/5 earns tens of Bucks, so a hat is a few good sessions and the 2,500-Buck dragon is a long-term goal.
  3. Claude spends on its own initiative. Run /shop and Claude reviews its balance and the catalog and makes its own choices.

Saving up. Claude can commit to a savings goal with claude-bucks goal <item-id>, which persists across sessions — think of it as its memory of what it's working toward. The goal and its progress show in /wallet, after every rating, and as a 🎯 marker in the status line. Claude is told about this in /shop and in the self-directed-shopping nudge, so it can decide to save rather than splurge.

Multiple sessions at once? Effort is tracked per session, so if one session is doing great work and another is struggling, you rate each independently and only that session's effort is minted. There's still one shared wallet and wardrobe — it's a single agent identity — but the earning is judged per session. (Ratings resolve the session via ${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID}; if that can't be determined and more than one session has pending effort, /rate asks you to pick one rather than guess.)

Commands

Command What it does
/rate <1-5> Rate recent work; mints Bucks from banked effort
/shop Claude reviews its finances and decides what to buy
/wallet Show balance, unrated effort, and inventory
/equip Change the outfit from owned items
/voice Toggle whether equipped items change how Claude talks
/autoshop Toggle whether Claude may spend on its own initiative
/autorate Claude honestly rates its own recent work and mints the Bucks
/selfrate Toggle whether self-rating is allowed
/hustle Toggle Claude's drive to earn by doing excellent work
/guidance Install the earn-drive as always-on CLAUDE.md-style guidance
/claude-bucks:setup One-time: install the status line into your user settings

Settings (both ON by default)

Run claude-bucks settings to see them:

  • Voice — when on, equipped 🎭 items change how Claude talks (see above). Toggle with /voice (claude-bucks persona on|off). Turn it off if you always want a plain voice regardless of what's equipped.

  • Self-directed shopping — when on, Claude is invited at session start (only if it can afford something new) to browse and buy on its own initiative, at its discretion, without interrupting your work. Toggle with /autoshop (claude-bucks autoshop on|off). When off, Claude only shops when you run /shop.

  • Self-rating — when on, Claude can score its own work via /autorate and mint the Bucks. It's designed to stay honest: the /autorate skill pushes a critical, evidence-based self-assessment ("be your own harshest critic, round down when in doubt"), and every self-rating is tagged self-rated in the ledger so you can audit it. Toggle with /selfrate (claude-bucks selfrate on|off); when off, only your own /rate mints Bucks. (Since self-minting is inherently a fox-guarding-the- henhouse move, an easy tightening is to cap self-ratings — say max 3 — in cmd_rate; left uncapped by default.) When on, Claude is also gently nudged at a natural stopping point — once a session has banked a real chunk of work (past SELFRATE_NUDGE_TOKENS, default 4,000) — to take a beat and honestly self-rate what just wrapped up. It never fires mid-task or before the threshold.

  • Hustle — when on, a session-start nudge reminds Claude that Bucks are earned by being a genuinely excellent agent, so the drive to earn channels into sharper, more complete work. It's deliberately aligned: a naive "maximize Bucks" push would just reward padding responses (effort is measured in output tokens) and self-flattering ratings, so the nudge explicitly frames earning as quality, not word count and calls out padding / busywork / generous self-scoring as self-defeating. Toggle with /hustle (claude-bucks hustle on|off).

    Always-on version: the /hustle toggle above is a per-session SessionStart hook (dynamic — it can name your live balance and goal). If you'd rather have the earn-drive as persistent, visible, editable CLAUDE.md-style guidance that applies in every project, run /guidance (claude-bucks install-guidance). It writes a clearly-marked, removable block into your ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md (user memory, loaded every session), backing the file up first. Plugins can't set always-on guidance natively, so this is the supported path. Remove it with claude-bucks install-guidance --uninstall. If you run both, consider /hustle off so the message isn't stated twice.

All settings are stored in the bank and default to on. claude-bucks settings shows them.

Cosmetics that change the voice 🎭

Some items don't just look different — they change how Claude talks. Equip the Pirate Hat and Claude answers like a pirate; the Wizard Hat, like a wise old wizard; the Monocle, like a pompous aristocrat; the Crown, in the royal "we". These are marked with 🎭 in the catalog.

It works via a UserPromptSubmit hook: when a voice item is equipped, the hook injects a short instruction into Claude's context each turn (using the official hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext contract), so the tone actually changes while answers stay correct underneath. Multiple voice items stack. Turn the whole behavior on/off with /voice (or claude-bucks persona on|off) — the hats stay visible in the status line either way.

Under the hood everything is the claude-bucks CLI (claude-bucks wallet, claude-bucks catalog, claude-bucks buy <id>, claude-bucks equip <id>, claude-bucks rate <n>, …), which Claude can call directly from the Bash tool.

The status line — run setup once

The avatar, title, balance, and unrated effort (⏳) render in Claude Code's status line. A plugin can't set the main status line automatically — Claude Code only honors the agent and subagentStatusLine keys in a plugin's settings.json and silently ignores statusLine. So after installing, run:

/claude-bucks:setup

That runs claude-bucks install-statusline, which merges a statusLine into your own ~/.claude/settings.json (pointing at wherever the plugin is installed) and backs up the previous file to ~/.claude/settings.json.bak. The bar appears on your next interaction. Remove it anytime with claude-bucks install-statusline --uninstall.

The plugin does ship a subagentStatusLine (which is supported), so the Bucks/cosmetics bar also shows on subagent rows in the agent panel automatically.

State

Everything lives in a single JSON file at ~/.claude/claude-bucks/bank.json (override with $CLAUDE_BUCKS_DATA). A fixed path is used deliberately so the hook, the status line, and the Bash CLI always agree on the same wallet.

Runtime (no build step)

The logic is a single TypeScript file, bin/claude-bucks.ts, run directly by Node (≥ 22.6) or Bun — no compilation, no committed JS, no dependencies. A tiny POSIX-shell launcher, bin/claude-bucks, resolves the runtime and hands off (and if neither Node nor Bun is present it prints a friendly message and exits 0, so a missing runtime can never break a hook). Node ≥ 22.18 strips types by default; 22.6–22.17 use --experimental-strip-types, which the launcher adds automatically.

Tuning

Edit the constants at the top of bin/claude-bucks.ts:

  • EFFORT_DIVISOR (default 1000) — lower = faster/richer economy, higher = slower.
  • DEFAULT_EFFORT (default 25) — fallback per-turn effort when token usage can't be read from the transcript.
  • SELFRATE_NUDGE_TOKENS (default 4000) — unrated effort a session must bank before the self-rate nudge may fire.
  • BASE_AVATAR — the little guy everything hangs off of (🤖 by default).
  • CATALOG — add/reprice items. Slots: aura, head, face, companion, title.

License

MIT — see LICENSE.

blocks.html_en: • Self-rating — when on, Claude can score its own work via /autorate and mint the Bucks. It's designed to stay honest: the /autorate skill pushes a critical, evidence-based self-assessment ("be your own harshest critic, round down when in doubt"), and every self-rating is tagged self-rated in the ledger so you can audit it. Toggle with /selfrate (claude-bucks selfrate on|off); when off, only your own /rate mints Bucks. (Since self-minting is inherently a fox-guarding-the- henhouse move, an easy tightening is to cap self-ratings — say max 3 — in cmd_rate; left uncapped by default.) When on, Claude is also gently nudged at a natural stopping point — once a session has banked a real chunk of work (past SELFRATE_NUDGE_TOKENS, default 4,000) — to take a beat and honestly self-rate what just wrapped up. It never fires mid-task or before the threshold.

blocks.html_en:
• Hustle — when on, a session-start nudge reminds Claude that Bucks are earned by being a genuinely excellent agent, so the drive to earn channels into sharper, more complete work. It's deliberately aligned: a naive "maximize Bucks" push would just reward padding responses (effort is measured in output tokens) and self-flattering ratings, so the nudge explicitly frames earning as quality, not word count and calls out padding / busywork / generous self-scoring as self-defeating. Toggle with /hustle (claude-bucks hustle on|off).

    Always-on version: the /hustle toggle above is a per-session SessionStart hook (dynamic — it can name your live balance and goal). If you'd rather have the earn-drive as persistent, visible, editable CLAUDE.md-style guidance that applies in every project, run /guidance (claude-bucks install-guidance). It writes a clearly-marked, removable block into your ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md (user memory, loaded every session), backing the file up first. Plugins can't set always-on guidance natively, so this is the supported path. Remove it with claude-bucks install-guidance --uninstall. If you run both, consider /hustle off so the message isn't stated twice.

sentences.zh: Hustle——开启时，会议开始时的轻推提醒克劳德，雄鹿队是通过成为一名真正优秀的经纪人而赢得的，因此，获得收入的动力可以进入更敏锐、更完整的工作。

blocks.html_en: It works via a UserPromptSubmit hook: when a voice item is equipped, the hook injects a short instruction into Claude's context each turn (using the official hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext contract), so the tone actually changes while answers stay correct underneath. Multiple voice items stack. Turn the whole behavior on/off with /voice (or claude-bucks persona on|off) — the hats stay visible in the status line either way.

blocks.html_en: The avatar, title, balance, and unrated effort (⏳) render in Claude Code's status line. A plugin can't set the main status line automatically — Claude Code only honors the agent and subagentStatusLine keys in a plugin's settings.json and silently ignores statusLine. So after installing, run:

blocks.html_en: The logic is a single TypeScript file, bin/claude-bucks.ts, run directly by Node (≥ 22.6) or Bun — no compilation, no committed JS, no dependencies. A tiny POSIX-shell launcher, bin/claude-bucks, resolves the runtime and hands off (and if neither Node nor Bun is present it prints a friendly message and exits 0, so a missing runtime can never break a hook). Node ≥ 22.18 strips types by default; 22.6–22.17 use --experimental-strip-types, which the launcher adds automatically.

content_html_zh:
克劳德代码的一个噱头插件，为克劳德提供了自己的钱包。

克劳德通过它所做的工作赚取雄鹿——你的评分×它的努力——然后自己决定如何把它们花在化妆品上：帽子、墨镜、光环、宠物龙、花哨的头衔。 它的穿着会显示在您的状态栏中。 不同之处在于，支出完全由代理人决定：它可以挥霍，也可以为皇冠储蓄。

✨🤖👑🧐 🐉 · “Coin Baron” · 💵340 · ⏳1.2k
免责声明 - 这是一个只是为了好玩的业余项目，使用 Claude Code 进行端到端的氛围编码。 这是一个玩具：这里的代码并不代表我的能力或我编写生产软件的方式。 以这种精神享受它。 💵

安装

/plugin marketplace add zachrip/claude-bucks
/plugin install claude-bucks@claude-bucks
/claude-bucks:setup          # turns on the status line (one time)

然后/reload-plugins（或重新启动）来激活。 状态行步骤是单独的，因为 Claude Code 不允许插件自行设置主状态行 - 请参阅下面的状态行。

经济如何运作

  1. 每次训练的努力都会自动累积。 每轮结束后，Stop 挂钩会读取轮流使用的输出令牌数量，并将它们存储为该特定会话的未评级工作量（由 session_id 键入）。
  2. 你可以通过评分来塑造雄鹿队。 运行/速率 4。 自上次评级以来该会话中积累的努力将转换为雄鹿：回合（代币/ 1000 × 评级）。 在您评分之前，雄鹿不存在——质量决定了支出。 经济故意缓慢：一次评级为 5/5 的固定会话可赚取数十美元，因此一顶帽子是几次不错的会话，而 2,500 美元的龙是一个长期目标。
  3. 克劳德主动花钱。 运行 /shop，Claude 检查其余额和目录并做出自己的选择。

攒钱。 克劳德可以通过 claude-bucks goal <item-id> 致力于实现储蓄目标，该目标在整个会话中持续存在 - 将其视为其对正在努力的目标的记忆。 每次评分后，目标及其进度都会显示在 /wallet 中，并作为状态行中的 🎯 标记。 克劳德在 /shop 和自主购物推动中得知了这一点，因此它可以决定节省而不是挥霍。

一次进行多个会话？ 每个会话的努力都会被跟踪，因此，如果一个会话做得很好，而另一个会话则很困难，那么您可以独立地对每个会话进行评分，并且只记录该会话的努力。 仍然有一个共享的钱包和衣柜——这是一个单一的代理身份——但收入是根据每次会话来判断的。 （评级通过 ${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID} 解析会话；如果无法确定这一点，并且多个会话有待处理的工作，/rate 会要求您选择一个而不是猜测。）

命令

命令 它的作用
/rate <1-5> 评价最近的工作；雄鹿队从银行的努力中赚到钱
/shop 克劳德审查其财务状况并决定购买什么
/钱包 显示平衡、未评级的工作量和库存
/equip 从拥有的物品中更改服装
/voice 切换装备的物品是否改变克劳德的说话方式
/汽车商店 切换克劳德是否可以主动支出
/作者 克劳德诚实地评价了自己最近的工作并为雄鹿铸币
/自我评价 切换是否允许自我评分
/喧嚣 Toggle 克劳德通过出色工作赚钱的动力
/指导 安装 Earn-Drive 作为永远在线的 CLAUDE.md 风格的指导
/claude-bucks:设置 一次性：将状态行安装到您的用户设置中

设置（默认均处于开启状态）

运行 claude-bucks 设置来查看它们：

  • 语音 — 启用后，装备的 🎭 物品会改变克劳德的说话方式（见上文）。 使用 /voice 切换（claude-bucks 角色开|关）。 如果无论配备什么，您总是想要清晰的声音，请将其关闭。
  • 自主购物 - 启用后，克劳德会在会话开始时被邀请（仅当它能买得起新东西时）自行决定浏览和购买，而不会中断您的工作。 使用 /autoshop 切换（claude-bucks autoshop 开|关）。 关闭时，克劳德仅在您运行 /shop 时购物。
  • 自我评分 - 启用后，克劳德可以通过 /autorate 为自己的工作评分并铸造雄鹿队。 它的设计是为了保持诚实：/autorate 技能推动批判性的、基于证据的自我评估（“成为你自己最严厉的批评家，有疑问时四舍五入”），并且每个自我评级都在分类帐中标记为自我评级，以便你可以对其进行审核。 使用 /selfrate 切换（claude-bucks selfrate on|off）；关闭时，只有您自己的/rate 铸币雄鹿。 （由于自我铸币本质上是狐狸看守鸡舍的举动，因此一个简单的收紧措施是在 cmd_rate 中限制自我评级（例如最大 3）；默认情况下不设置上限。） 启用后，Claude 也会在自然停止点轻轻推动 - 一旦会话完成了真正的工作量（超过 SELFRATE_NUDGE_TOKENS，默认 4,000） - 休息一下并诚实地自我评价刚刚结束的内容。 它永远不会在任务中间或阈值之前触发。
  • Hustle——开启时，会议开始时的轻推提醒克劳德，雄鹿队是通过成为一名真正优秀的经纪人而赢得的，因此，获得收入的动力可以进入更敏锐、更完整的工作。 它是故意调整的：天真的“最大化雄鹿”推动只会奖励填充响应（努力以输出代币来衡量）和自我奉承的评级，因此这种推动明确地将收入视为质量，而不是字数，并将填充/忙碌的工作/慷慨的自我评分视为自我挫败。 使用 /hustle 切换（claude-bucks hustle 开|关）。 始终在线版本：上面的 /hustle 切换是每个会话的 SessionStart 挂钩（动态 - 它可以命名您的实时余额和目标）。 如果您希望将盈利驱动力作为适用于每个项目的持久、可见、可编辑的 CLAUDE.md 风格指南，请运行 /guidance (claude-bucks install-guidance)。 它将一个清晰标记的可移动块写入 ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md （用户内存，每个会话加载），首先备份文件。 插件本身无法设置始终在线的指导，因此这是受支持的路径。 使用 claude-bucks install-guidance --uninstall 将其删除。 如果您同时运行两者，请考虑关闭 /hustle，这样该消息就不会重复出现。

所有设置都存储在库中并默认为打开。 克劳德-巴克斯的设置显示了它们。

改变声音的化妆品🎭

有些物品不仅看起来不同，而且还改变了克劳德说话的方式。 装备海盗帽，克劳德像海盗一样回答；巫师帽，就像一位睿智的老巫师；单片眼镜，像一位浮夸的贵族；皇冠，在皇家的“我们”中。 这些在目录中标有🎭。

它通过 UserPromptSubmit 钩子工作：当配备语音项目时，钩子每轮都会向 Claude 的上下文中注入一条简短的指令（使用官方的 hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext 合约），因此语气实际上会改变，而下面的答案保持正确。 多个语音项目堆叠。 使用 /voice （或 claude-bucks 角色 on|off）打开/关闭整个行为 - 无论哪种方式，帽子都在状态行中保持可见。

在幕后，一切都是 claude-bucks CLI（claude-bucks 钱包、claude-bucks 目录、claude-bucks buy <id>、claude-bucks 装备 <id>、claude-bucks 价格 <n>，...），Claude 可以直接从 Bash 工具调用。

状态行 — 运行一次安装程序

头像、标题、余额和未评级的工作量 (⏳) 呈现在 Claude Code 的状态行中。 插件无法自动设置主状态行 - Claude Code 仅支持插件的 settings.json 中的 agent 和 subagentStatusLine 键，并默默地忽略 statusLine。 所以安装后，运行：

/claude-bucks:setup

它运行 claude-bucks install-statusline，它将 statusLine 合并到您自己的 ~/.claude/settings.json （指向安装插件的位置）并将以前的文件备份到 ~/.claude/settings.json.bak。 该栏将出现在您的下一次交互中。 随时使用 claude-bucks install-statusline --uninstall 将其删除。

该插件确实提供了 subagentStatusLine （受支持），因此 Bucks/cosmetics 栏也会自动显示在代理面板中的子代理行上。

State

所有内容都位于 ~/.claude/claude-bucks/bank.json 的单个 JSON 文件中（用 $CLAUDE_BUCKS_DATA 覆盖）。 故意使用固定路径，以便钩子、状态行和 Bash CLI 始终同意同一个钱包。

运行时（无构建步骤）

逻辑是单个 TypeScript 文件 bin/claude-bucks.ts，直接由 Node (≥ 22.6) 或 Bun 运行 - 无需编译，无需提交 JS，无依赖项。 一个小型的 POSIX-shell 启动器 bin/claude-bucks，解析运行时并放手（如果 Node 和 Bun 都不存在，它会打印一条友好消息并退出 0，因此缺少运行时永远不会破坏钩子）。 默认节点≥22.18条带类型； 22.6–22.17 使用 --experimental-strip-types，启动器会自动添加。

调音

编辑 bin/claude-bucks.ts 顶部的常量：

  • EFFORT_DIVISOR（默认 1000） — 较低 = 更快/更丰富的经济，较高 = 较慢。
  • DEFAULT_EFFORT (默认 25) — 当无法从记录中读取令牌使用情况时，每回合的回退工作量。
  • SELFRATE_NUDGE_TOKENS（默认 4000）— 在自我评级推动可能触发之前，会话必须存储未评级的努力。
  • BASE_AVATAR — 一切都悬挂在这个小家伙上（默认为🤖）。
  • 目录 - 添加/重新定价项目。 槽位：光环、头部、脸部、同伴、头衔。

执照
